---

  echo: true

## 研究问题

评估母亲妊娠期糖尿病（GDM）与子代7岁肥胖风险的关联。

## 读取数据


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
dat <- read_csv("data_derived/analysis_dataset.csv")
dim(dat)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 2000   11
```


:::
:::


## 样本基本情况


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
table(dat$gdm)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

   0    1 
1883  117 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
table(dat$child_obesity)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```

   0    1 
1837  163 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(dat$maternal_age)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
  18.00   27.30   30.30   30.38   33.40   45.00 
```


:::

```{.r .cell-code}
summary(dat$prepreg_bmi)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
   Min. 1st Qu.  Median    Mean 3rd Qu.    Max. 
  15.50   20.90   23.60   23.85   26.60   41.40 
```


:::
:::


## 主分析


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
library(broom)
fit_adj <- glm(
  child_obesity ~ gdm + maternal_age + prepreg_bmi + parity + child_sex,
  data = dat,
  family = binomial()
)
tidy(fit_adj, exponentiate = TRUE, conf.int = TRUE)
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
# A tibble: 6 × 7
  term          estimate std.error statistic  p.value conf.low conf.high
  <chr>            <dbl>     <dbl>     <dbl>    <dbl>    <dbl>     <dbl>
1 (Intercept)    0.00169    0.775     -8.24  1.75e-16 0.000362   0.00757
2 gdm            2.11       0.263      2.85  4.42e- 3 1.23       3.47   
3 maternal_age   1.04       0.0187     2.34  1.92e- 2 1.01       1.08   
4 prepreg_bmi    1.10       0.0187     5.15  2.58e- 7 1.06       1.14   
5 parity         1.03       0.0910     0.341 7.33e- 1 0.860      1.23   
6 child_sexMale  1.34       0.167      1.73  8.39e- 2 0.964      1.86   
```


:::
:::


## 结果解释

在调整 maternal age、prepregnancy BMI、parity 和 child sex 后，GDM 与子代肥胖风险的关联见上表。
